name: Fred Mcmurrays' Chocolate Fudge Upside Down C
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together sugar and butter.
2. Sift flour, salt, baking powder, 1-1/2 tablespoons cocoa, milk, and walnuts several times.
3. Add the sifted ingredients alternately with the milk to the creamed sugar and butter mixture.
4. Pour the batter into a greased cake pan and sprinkle with nuts.
5. Mix together brown sugar, white sugar, and 4 tablespoons cocoa.
6. Spread the mixture over the top of the cake batter.
7. Pour 1-1/2 cups boiling water over the entire cake.
8. Bake at 375°F for about 30 minutes.
9. Cool slightly, then turn the cake upside down.
